title: Runner upgrade: Strategic Review + Meta-analysis for reasoning-driven evolution
description: Runner currently is a thin gate (health-check → spawn test-loop → post-flight). Upgrade to act as 'supervisor brain': (1) Add Strategic Review step before spawning test-loop — reads last 3 round summaries, analyzes trends (coverage plateau, regression hotspots, fix quality), injects directives (prioritize tests, scan focus areas). (2) Add Meta-analysis step after test-loop returns — evaluates test-loop's efficiency, identifies framework issues, can inject fixQueue items for self-repair. Create trend-analyzer.sh helper script.
